title: Everything Nigerian
description: This mod is a project that basically describes Everything about Nigeria, my Home Country in Minecraft.
body:
**Experience Nigeria in Minecraft with the Everything Nigerian Mod!**

##### A Mod that shows everything about my Home Country!

     
**Features:**

*   **Nigerian Blocks**: Authentic architectural elements for your builds.  
*   **Traditional Foods**: Enjoy akara, eba and okro soup, etc, etc  
*   **Available for NeoForge**: Seamless integration with your existing setups. And with Everything Japanese and Everything Korean
*   **Structures**:  Explore the various structures scattered across the minecraft world, greatly mimicking their real-world COUNTERPARTS

Dive into a world where you feel like you're in Nigeria!

**Download now and embark on a Nigerian adventure in Minecraft!**

# [Suggest Ideas](https://forms.gle/UAFq5rQCPzZTyWJf7)

##### If you enjoy Everything Nigerian and want development to continue consider donating [here](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted\_button\_id=5YH3R6EQK5628)
